prestazioni: Engine: EJ257 (closed-deck, forged internals, 2.5L flat-four) - Replace stock IHI VF53 turbo with a Garrett GTX4202R Gen II (84mm compressor, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) for 550whp on E85 with supporting mods (ID1050x injectors, Cobb Big SF intake, Killer B Motorsport equal-length headers).

Drivetrain: STI 6-speed manual (TY856WB) - Install a PPG Stage 3 carbon syncromesh kit with billet shift forks and a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (2.2:1 final drive) to handle increased torque.

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (STX46-20-S1) with 8kg/mm front springs and 10kg/mm rear springs, paired with Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and STI Group N top mounts for track-focused alignment (-2.5° front camber, -1.8° rear).
estetica: Aero: Seibon Carbon JDM-spec widebody kit (S209-specific front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with a Voltex Type-7 rear wing (carbon fiber, 1,200mm width) for 300kg+ downforce at 160mph.

Wheels: Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x10.5 +33 front, 18x11 +35 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear) and Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (380mm rotors) for aggressive stance and braking.

Interior: Recaro SP-G (S209 edition) seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, a Momo Prototipo Evo steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR) mounted on a custom carbon fiber A-pillar pod.
